query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM studentAccounts WHERE isActive = 1) as total_cadastrados,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members) as total_membros_banco,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM studentAccounts WHERE memberId IS NOT NULL) as vinculados_a_membro,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM studentAccounts WHERE memberId IS NULL) as sem_vinculo_membro;
